name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected

labels: bug

---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / console output
If applicable, paste console errors or add screenshots.

## Environment
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 124]
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
- Node version: [e.g. 20.x]
- Which module: [Synthograsizer / Glitcher / Agent Studio / ChatRoom]
